creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: riggs
Date: Sat Apr 15 14:40:45 UTC 2017
New revision: 438585
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/438585

Log:
  Update to upstream version 4.8.3

  Detailed maintainer log:
    bmpp modification: /CropBox
      Previous versions of bmpp only wrote a /MediaBox to PDF output, current
    versions write a /CropBox too.
    bmpp modification: /CreationTime and /ModTime
      Timestamps are included in PDF output.

  PR:		218560
  Submitted by:	takefu@airport.fm (maintainer)
  MFH:		2017Q2

Changes:
  head/graphics/bmeps/Makefile
  head/graphics/bmeps/distinfo
